'''royazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaggering|swaggering]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaggering|swaggering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| royazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:royazhithi|royazhithi]] || [[word:royazhiji|royazhiji]] || [[word:royazhishi|royazhishi]] || [[word:royazhiki|royazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:royazhuthuthu|royazhuthuthu]] || [[word:royazhujuju|royazhujuju]] || [[word:royazhushushu|royazhushushu]] || [[word:royazhukuku|royazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:royazhuthu|royazhuthu]] || [[word:royazhuju|royazhuju]] || [[word:royazhushu|royazhushu]] || [[word:royazhuku|royazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:royazhufthuf|royazhufthuf]] || [[word:royazhufjuf|royazhufjuf]] || [[word:royazhufshuf|royazhufshuf]] || [[word:royazhufkuf|royazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:royazhethe|royazhethe]] || [[word:royazheje|royazheje]] || [[word:royazheshe|royazheshe]] || [[word:royazheke|royazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:royazhothotho|royazhothotho]] || [[word:royazhojojo|royazhojojo]] || [[word:royazhoshosho|royazhoshosho]] || [[word:royazhokoko|royazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:royazhotho|royazhotho]] || [[word:royazhojo|royazhojo]] || [[word:royazhosho|royazhosho]] || [[word:royazhoko|royazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:royazhofthof|royazhofthof]] || [[word:royazhofjof|royazhofjof]] || [[word:royazhofshof|royazhofshof]] || [[word:royazhofkof|royazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:royazhïfthïf|royazhïfthïf]] || [[word:royazhïfjïf|royazhïfjïf]] || [[word:royazhïfshïf|royazhïfshïf]] || [[word:royazhïfkïf|royazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:royazhïfthïfthïf|royazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:royazhïfjïfjïf|royazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:royazhïfshïfshïf|royazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:royazhïfkïfkïf|royazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:royazhïfthïf|royazhïfthïf]] || [[word:royazhïfjïf|royazhïfjïf]] || [[word:royazhïfshïf|royazhïfshïf]] || [[word:royazhïfkïf|royazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:royazhïfthïf|royazhïfthïf]] || [[word:royazhïfjïf|royazhïfjïf]] || [[word:royazhïfshïf|royazhïfshïf]] || [[word:royazhïfkïf|royazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:royazhæthæ|royazhæthæ]] || [[word:royazhæjæ|royazhæjæ]] || [[word:royazhæshæ|royazhæshæ]] || [[word:royazhækæ|royazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:royazhathatha|royazhathatha]] || [[word:royazhajaja|royazhajaja]] || [[word:royazhashasha|royazhashasha]] || [[word:royazhakaka|royazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:royazhatha|royazhatha]] || [[word:royazhaja|royazhaja]] || [[word:royazhasha|royazhasha]] || [[word:royazhaka|royazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:royazhafthaf|royazhafthaf]] || [[word:royazhafjaf|royazhafjaf]] || [[word:royazhafshaf|royazhafshaf]] || [[word:royazhafkaf|royazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:royazhasha|royazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:royazhshësha|royazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:royazhrosha|royazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:royazhmusha|royazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:royazhyasha|royazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroyazhnkshësha|goroyazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroyazhnkrosha|goroyazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroyazhnkmusha|goroyazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroyazhnkyasha|goroyazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:royayazhasha|royayazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:royayazhshësha|royayazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:royayazhrosha|royayazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:royayazhmusha|royayazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:royayazhyasha|royayazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroyayazhnkshësha|goroyayazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroyayazhnkrosha|goroyayazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroyayazhnkmusha|goroyayazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroyayazhnkyasha|goroyayazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:reyæzhasha|reyæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:reyæzhshësha|reyæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:reyæzhrosha|reyæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:reyæzhmusha|reyæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:reyæzhyasha|reyæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goreyæzhnkshësha|goreyæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goreyæzhnkrosha|goreyæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goreyæzhnkmusha|goreyæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goreyæzhnkyasha|goreyæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:royfazhasha|royfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:royfazhshësha|royfazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:royfazhrosha|royfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:royfazhmusha|royfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:royfazhyasha|royfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroyfazhnkshësha|goroyfazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroyfazhnkrosha|goroyfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroyfazhnkmusha|goroyfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroyfazhnkyasha|goroyfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
